sglang.title: h200 tuning  fused_moe_triton config for  Mixtral 8x7B/8x22B and Qwen2 57BA14B
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
related issue: #2471
add h200 tuning fused_moe_triton kernel config for   mixtral 8x7b/8x22b and qwen2 57ba14b.

For mixtral 8x7b, H200 can serving with tp1/tp2/tp4/tp8 in BF16 and FP8.
For Miaxtral 8x22b, H200 can serving with tp4/tp8 in BF16, and tp2/tp4/tp8 in FP8.
For Qwen257BA14B, H200 can serv

Modifications

vllm.title: [V1] Simpify vision block hash for prefix caching by removing offset from hash
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Reuse the example in #11187
Taking a series of 3 blocks as an example: T0,T1,P00,P01 | P02,P03,P04,T2 | T3,P10,P11,P12, where Ti is i-th text token and Pxy is the y-th placeholder token of the x-th image, so this prompt has 2 images (P0 and P1). Assuming the image hash of P0 and P1 is aaa and bbb, r

vllm.title: [V1][VLM] V1 support for selected single-image models.
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR main adds V1 support for a number of single-image models since the code changes are sizable enough for a review.
To summarize, this PR:

Adds V1 support via merged multi-modal processor for aria, blip2, chameleon, fuyu.
Consolidates common code related to dummy data generation for merged mul

vllm.title: [Benchmark] Add benchmark script for CPU offloading
vllm.author: ApostaC
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Note: This PR is part of the big CPU offloading PR #10874 -- this PR contains a benchmark script of "long document QA" use case, to test the effectiveness of CPU offloading
About the workload
The workload has N different long documents. It will shuffle the documents and query the serving engine mult

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Refactor] Unify model management in frontend
vllm.author: joerunde
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR consolidates the OpenAI server's model management into a new OpenAIServingModels class, which handles the model-related endpoints, similar to how e.g. OpenAIServingChat handles the chat endpoint. A single instance of this handler class is created, and all other handlers delegate model manage

vllm.title: [VLM] Add max-count checking in data parser for single image models
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds max_mm_counts to the multimodal data parser to raise an error early if the model doesn't support multi-input. This avoids confusing errors during processing or even inside the model itself.

vllm.title: [Misc] Optimize Qwen2-VL LoRA test
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I retrained a QWen-VL LoRA.  In my local environment using A800,   I tested the model on 100 image samples, the generation results were completely aligned with the transformers output.
BTW, add LoRA support for  vision modules and projecter modules

vllm.title: [Misc] Replace space with - in the file names
vllm.author: houseroad
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
There are some space in the file names. And this is not allowed in the codebase.
Since they are all just issue templates, so we are going to replace the space with "-".
